name: RDS Database
description: Amazon Relational Database Service managed database instance

inputs.name: identifier
inputs.label: DB Identifier
inputs.description: Unique name for the RDS instance

inputs.name: engine
inputs.label: Engine
inputs.description: Database engine to use

inputs.name: engine_version
inputs.label: Engine Version
inputs.description: Database engine version (PostgreSQL, MySQL, or MariaDB)

inputs.name: instance_class
inputs.label: Instance Class
inputs.description: RDS instance type

inputs.name: allocated_storage
inputs.label: Storage (GB)
inputs.description: Allocated storage in gigabytes

inputs.name: db_name
inputs.label: Database Name
inputs.description: Name of the initial database to create

inputs.name: username
inputs.label: Master Username
inputs.description: Master database username

inputs.name: manage_master_user_password
inputs.label: Manage Password via Secrets Manager
inputs.description: Let RDS manage the master password in AWS Secrets Manager

inputs.name: subnet_ids
inputs.label: Subnet IDs
inputs.description: Comma-separated subnet IDs for the DB subnet group

inputs.name: vpc_security_group_ids
inputs.label: Security Group IDs
inputs.description: Comma-separated security group IDs

inputs.name: storage_type
inputs.label: Storage Type
inputs.description: Type of storage (gp3 recommended)

inputs.name: storage_encrypted
inputs.label: Encrypt Storage
inputs.description: Enable storage encryption

inputs.name: multi_az
inputs.label: Multi-AZ
inputs.description: Enable Multi-AZ deployment for high availability

inputs.name: publicly_accessible
inputs.label: Publicly Accessible
inputs.description: Allow public access to the database

inputs.name: port
inputs.label: Port
inputs.description: Database port (5432 for PostgreSQL, 3306 for MySQL)

inputs.name: iam_database_authentication_enabled
inputs.label: IAM Authentication
inputs.description: Enable IAM database authentication

inputs.name: backup_retention_period
inputs.label: Backup Retention (days)
inputs.description: Number of days to retain automated backups

inputs.name: backup_window
inputs.label: Backup Window
inputs.description: Daily backup window (UTC)

inputs.name: maintenance_window
inputs.label: Maintenance Window
inputs.description: Weekly maintenance window (UTC)

inputs.name: skip_final_snapshot
inputs.label: Skip Final Snapshot
inputs.description: Skip creating a final snapshot when destroying

inputs.name: copy_tags_to_snapshot
inputs.label: Copy Tags to Snapshot
inputs.description: Copy all instance tags to snapshots

inputs.name: deletion_protection
inputs.label: Deletion Protection
inputs.description: Prevent accidental database deletion

inputs.name: auto_minor_version_upgrade
inputs.label: Auto Minor Upgrade
inputs.description: Automatically apply minor engine upgrades

inputs.name: performance_insights_enabled
inputs.label: Performance Insights
inputs.description: Enable Performance Insights for query analysis

inputs.name: monitoring_interval
inputs.label: Enhanced Monitoring Interval
inputs.description: Interval in seconds for enhanced monitoring (0 to disable)

inputs.name: max_allocated_storage
inputs.label: Max Auto-Scale Storage (GB)
inputs.description: Maximum storage for auto-scaling (0 to disable)

inputs.name: enabled_cloudwatch_logs_exports
inputs.label: CloudWatch Log Exports
inputs.description: Comma-separated log types to export (postgresql, mysql, audit, etc.)

inputs.name: ca_cert_identifier
inputs.label: CA Certificate
inputs.description: Certificate authority identifier for SSL connections
